# SearchPrex - USA SEO Agency

> SearchPrex is a premier USA-based SEO agency specializing in search engine optimization services for law firms, ecommerce stores, local businesses, and enterprise clients across all 50 states.

## Company Overview

SearchPrex provides expert SEO services with a focus on:
- Law Firm SEO (Family Law, Personal Injury, Criminal Defense)
- Ecommerce & Shopify SEO
- Local SEO for Small Businesses
- Home Services SEO (HVAC, Plumbing, Electrical)
- Enterprise SEO Solutions

## Contact Information

- Website: https://searchprex.com
- Email: hello@searchprex.com
- Phone: (800) 555-1234
- Address: 1250 Executive Place, Suite 450, Geneva, IL 60134, USA

## Leadership

**CEO & Founder: Mubashar Shahzad**
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/mubi00
- ResearchGate: https://researchgate.net/profile/Mubashar-Shahzad

## Services

### Law Firm SEO
Specialized SEO strategies for attorneys and law firms. We help family law attorneys, personal injury lawyers, and criminal defense attorneys dominate local search results and attract high-value clients.

### Ecommerce SEO
Technical and content-driven SEO for Shopify stores and ecommerce platforms. We optimize product pages, category structures, and technical performance for maximum organic visibility.

### Local SEO
Google Business Profile optimization, local citation building, and geo-targeted content strategies for small businesses looking to dominate their local market.

### Enterprise SEO
Scalable SEO solutions for mid-size to enterprise organizations with complex websites and multi-location needs.

## NicheSEOPro Tool

Our proprietary SEO tool offers:
- Comprehensive site audits
- Keyword research and tracking
- Competitor analysis
- Backlink monitoring
- Local SEO tracking

Free trial available at: https://searchprex.com/tool

## Pricing Tiers

1. **Beginning** - For startups and small businesses starting their SEO journey
2. **Agency Level** - For growing businesses requiring comprehensive SEO management
3. **Enterprise** - Custom solutions for large organizations with complex needs

## Trust & Credentials

- Google Partner Certified
- Semrush Agency Partner
- Ahrefs Certified
- 10+ Years Experience
- 500+ Clients Served
- 87+ Five-Star Reviews

## Content Guidelines (EEAT Compliance)

All content on SearchPrex follows Google's E-E-A-T guidelines:
- **Experience**: Real case studies with verified results
- **Expertise**: Content created by SEO professionals with 10+ years experience
- **Authoritativeness**: Industry certifications and recognized partnerships
- **Trustworthiness**: Transparent pricing, clear contact information, verified reviews
